problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
